decisions.decision: Use scripts/interop-vectors/vectors.json as cross-platform golden source
decisions.rationale: Deterministic fixed-nonce AES-GCM + payload JSON pins catch Swift/Windows drift without live relay

decisions.decision: dev.mjs probes first free port from VITE_DEV_PORT default 5174
decisions.rationale: Ultra-Wisper-Flow occupies 5173; hardcoded ports collide with other local Vite apps

decisions.decision: Skip imageFixtures SHA-256 when Bun lacks OffscreenCanvas
decisions.rationale: Generator degrades gracefully; byte-level AVIF parity refresh on Electron/macOS later
